content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在咖啡店點飲料",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問想要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xiǎng yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想要一杯小杯的拿鐵，少冰，半糖。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi xiǎo bēi de nátiě, shǎo bīng, bàn táng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de na2 tie3, shao3 bing1, ban4 tang2.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like a small latte, less ice, half sugar.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 작은 라떼 한 잔에 얼음 적게, 당도 반으로 해주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，小杯拿鐵少冰半糖，這樣是八十塊。內用還是外帶？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xiǎo bēi nátiě shǎo bīng bàn táng, zhèyàng shì bā shí kuài. Nèi yòng háishì wài dài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xiao3 bei1 na2 tie3 shao3 bing1 ban4 tang2, zhe4 yang4 shi4 ba1 shi2 kuai4. Nei4 yong4 hai2 shi4 wai4 dai4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, a small latte with less ice and half sugar, that's 80 dollars. For here or to go?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 작은 라떼에 얼음 적게, 당도 반으로 하면 80원입니다. 드시고 가시나요, 포장하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "外帶，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Wài dài, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wai4 dai4, xie4 xie.",
          "translation_en": "To go, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "포장이요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, qǐng děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4 ti2, qing3 deng3 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Small latte, less ice, half sugar", "Medium latte, no ice, normal sugar", "Large latte, less ice, half sugar"],
          "options_ko": ["작은 라떼, 얼음 적게, 당도 반", "중간 라떼, 얼음 없음, 당도 보통", "큰 라떼, 얼음 적게, 당도 반"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to the dialogue and repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Order a medium iced green tea with half sugar, for here."
    },
    {
      "title": "確認價錢",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，請問這個紅茶多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn zhège hóngchá duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si, qing3 wen4 zhe4 ge hong2 cha2 duo1 shao qian2?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how much is this black tea?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 홍차는 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "這個紅茶一杯是三十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zhège hóngchá yī bēi shì sān shí wǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 ge hong2 cha2 yi1 bei1 shi4 san1 shi2 wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "This black tea is 35 dollars per cup.",
          "translation_ko": "이 홍차는 한 잔에 35원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "那中杯的拿鐵呢？",
          "pinyin": "Nà zhōng bēi de nátiě ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 zhong1 bei1 de na2 tie3 ne?",
          "translation_en": "And what about a medium latte?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 중간 라떼는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "中杯拿鐵是六十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zhōng bēi nátiě shì liù shí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhong1 bei1 na2 tie3 shi4 liu4 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "A medium latte is 60 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "중간 라떼는 60원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，我要一杯中杯拿鐵，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ yào yī bēi zhōng bēi nátiě, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhong1 bei1 na2 tie3, xie4 xie.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll have a medium latte, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 중간 라떼 한 잔 주세요, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much is a medium latte?",
          "question_ko": "중간 라떼는 얼마입니까?",
          "options_en": ["35 dollars", "60 dollars", "80 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["35원", "60원", "80원"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to the dialogue and repeat each line, paying attention to the intonation of questions.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Ask the price of a small iced latte, then order one."
    },
    {
      "title": "請再說一次",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 he1 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，可以再說一次嗎？請說慢一點。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, kěyǐ zài shuō yī cì ma? Qǐng shuō màn yī diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si, ke3 yi3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4 ma? Qing3 shuo1 man4 yi1 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, could you say it again? Please speak a little slower.",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 한 번 더 말씀해 주시겠어요? 조금 천천히 말씀해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題。請問... 你... 想要... 喝... 什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Qǐng wèn... nǐ... xiǎng yào... hē... shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4 ti2. Qing3 wen4... ni3... xiang3 yao4... he1... shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. What... would... you... like... to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 무엇을... 드시고... 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，我想要一杯大杯的豆漿，去冰，正常甜。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi dà bēi de dòujiāng, qù bīng, zhèngcháng tián.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 da4 bei1 de dou4 jiang1, qu4 bing1, zheng4 chang2 tian2.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'd like a large soy milk, no ice, normal sweetness.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 큰 두유 한 잔에 얼음 없이, 당도 보통으로 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，大杯豆漿去冰正常甜，這樣是五十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, dà bēi dòujiāng qù bīng zhèngcháng tián, zhèyàng shì wǔ shí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, da4 bei1 dou4 jiang1 qu4 bing1 zheng4 chang2 tian2, zhe4 yang4 shi4 wu3 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, a large soy milk, no ice, normal sweetness, that's 50 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 큰 두유에 얼음 없이, 당도 보통으로 하면 50원입니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Large soy milk, no ice, normal sugar", "Medium soy milk, less ice, half sugar", "Small soy milk, no ice, normal sugar"],
          "options_ko": ["큰 두유, 얼음 없음, 당도 보통", "중간 두유, 얼음 적게, 당도 반", "작은 두유, 얼음 없음, 당도 보통"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to the dialogue and repeat each line, especially the slower speech in the third turn.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Ask the staff to repeat and speak slower, then order a small iced black tea with half sugar."
    }
  ]
}
